## Summary

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Problem Statement

What problem does this feature solve? Is this related to an existing frustration?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like. Include API examples, CLI usage, or
configuration samples if applicable.

```
# Example CLI usage or API call
infragraph ...
```

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or references here.
